name: Zoom Docs
description: Connect Cline to Zoom Docs through this MCP server configuration from the imported plugin marketplace bundle.

env.name: ZOOM_DOCS_MCP_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.description: Zoom Docs value for zoom docs mcp access token.

install.notes: Imported from plugin bundle config `zoom-plugin/.mcp.json`. The remote server requires the configured HTTP header values at runtime.
